name: Luis Fernando Gomez
highlights: 7 years of software development experience across professional, freelance, and academic projects.
Hands-on work with legacy code, migrations, and real production environments.
Experience in multidisciplinary teams and development of web and interactive applications with C# and Unity.

summaries.fullstack: Developer with 7 years of experience building and maintaining web applications end to end. I've worked in professional environments with legacy code and internal CRMs, and on personal projects where I own every layer of the stack.
summaries.backend: Developer focused on business logic, system integration, and application maintenance. Experience with databases, migrations, APIs, and services in real production environments.
summaries.frontend: Developer with a solid web foundation, focused on building functional interfaces tied to real product needs. I care as much about the visual detail as the logic behind it.
summaries.gamedev: Developer with Unity and C# experience applied to interactive projects with purpose. I've worked in multidisciplinary teams combining game logic, UX, and concrete communication or learning goals.
